assertions.statement: Legacy orchestration-state nextAction can be displayed as observedLegacyState but cannot derive mainAgentNextAction when a RequirementRecord is active.
Legacy handoff fields mainAgentNextAction/mainAgentReady and next_action/ready cannot authorize auto-continue without runtimeResumeProjection.source=requirement_record.
Old runtime/governance user_story_mapping and packet roots are no longer the canonical dispatch authority in requirement-backed mode.
bmad-help projections cannot override the RequirementRecord implementationEntryGate with a recomputed legacy readiness decision.
